milestone_summary.phase_1: COMPLETE — Postgres + determinism + onOrder feedback. Verified.
milestone_summary.phase_2: COMPLETE + verified live — Supabase auth, requireTenant() chokepoint, /shop/[slug] routing, Membership, tenant-tz determinism, ESLint isolation rule, 2-tenant test, tenant-cache. Roy is OWNER of beauty-square (1023 products) at /shop/beauty-square/dashboard. 6/6 plans, 49 tests, lint clean, build green.
milestone_summary.phase_3: IN PROGRESS — Wave 1 done (schema + encryption + migration). Wave 2 (Shopify connect) blocked on shop domain + token verification.

phase_3_plans.name: Schema (6 models) + AES-256-GCM encryption + additive migration
OAuth connect flow
phase_3_plans.status: re-sequenced — using CUSTOM-APP TOKEN instead of public OAuth per Roy's choice; OAuth UI deferred to multi-tenant/deploy

phase_3_plans.name: Bulk Operations backfill + Location/InventoryLevel + guarded synthetic→real cutover (lib/shopify/cutover.ts)
Webhooks (HMAC + idempotency)
phase_3_plans.status: not_started — needs API secret (have it) + live delivery deferred to deploy

decisions.decision: Custom-app Admin API token instead of public OAuth app (Plan 03-02 re-sequenced)
decisions.rationale: Roy has direct Beauty Square store-admin access; custom token = real data flowing today with no Partner app, no OAuth redirect, no HTTPS tunnel. Single-store, fine for the only tenant now. Public OAuth flow deferred to multi-tenant/client-2/deploy.

decisions.decision: Synthetic→real cutover REPLACES the synthetic seed (guarded)
decisions.rationale: Roy confirmed. On first real backfill, lib/shopify/cutover.ts does a guarded dry-run-count + explicit-confirm before deleting the tenant's synthetic Product/SalesHistory/Prediction/Order (preserving Supplier/Promo/MonthlyContext), then ingests real.
No live Odoo test target; ODOO ingest depends on the Phase-4 merge layer. Phase 3 = Shopify-complete. Roy confirmed. Move ODOO-* to a later milestone/tail.

decisions.decision: Prisma migrations via `migrate diff --script` + `migrate deploy`, NOT `migrate dev`
decisions.rationale: migrate dev is non-interactive-hostile (blocks on data-loss warnings even with --create-only). diff+deploy is the Supabase-safe non-interactive path. Stop the dev server first (free-tier pooler connection cap).

credentials_status.WARNING_token_format: SHOPIFY_ADMIN_TOKEN starts with `atkn_` — NON-STANDARD for a Shopify Admin API token (expected `shpat_`). VERIFY it works (or re-grab the real shpat_ token from the custom app's API credentials page) before the backfill.
credentials_status.MISSING: SHOPIFY_SHOP_DOMAIN — Beauty Square's <store>.myshopify.com. Required for ALL Shopify API calls. Ask Roy or find it in admin URL admin.shopify.com/store/<store>.
credentials_status.api_secret_present: SHOPIFY_API_SECRET (shpss_...) is set — needed for webhook HMAC in Plan 03-04 (webhooks deferred to deploy).

next_actions: 2. Verify SHOPIFY_ADMIN_TOKEN: curl https://<domain>/admin/api/2026-04/shop.json -H 'X-Shopify-Access-Token: <token>' — expect 200 + shop JSON. If 401, the atkn_ token is wrong → re-grab the shpat_ Admin API access token.

3. Execute Plan 03-03 (re-sequenced for custom token): build lib/shopify/shopify.ts GraphQL client from the token+domain (NOT the OAuth session); wire a small script to encrypt the token into ShopifyConnection for the beauty-square tenant + set Tenant.shopifyDomain; run Bulk Operations backfill (orders 365d + products/variants + on_hand inventory via quantities(names:["on_hand"])); then the GUARDED cutover (lib/shopify/cutover.ts) — dry-run count + confirm before deleting synthetic data; re-run forecasts on real data.
4. Then Plans 03-04 (webhooks, HMAC-tested locally, live deferred) + 03-05 (reconcile cron + uninstall).

key_files.research: .planning/phases/03-real-shopify-ingest-odoo/03-RESEARCH.md (pinned versions, Bulk Ops + HMAC + on_hand code sketches, cutover order)
key_files.encryption: lib/crypto/encryption.ts (encrypt/decrypt — use to store the token in ShopifyConnection)
key_files.webhook_resolver: lib/auth/webhook-context.ts (resolveTenantByDomain — switch to findUnique now that Tenant.shopifyDomain @unique exists)
key_files.mock_to_delete: lib/shopify/client.ts (mock — delete + remove its eslint.config.mjs allow-list entry when real client lands)

dev_server: npm run dev @ localhost:3082 (background; stop it before any prisma migrate / DB script — Supabase pooler limit). App live: Roy logged in, /shop/beauty-square/dashboard shows 1023 products.
git_state: All work committed on main of the local clone (NOT pushed to Kidaup12/stock-estimator upstream — pending). Phases 1+2 complete, Phase 3 Wave 1 complete.
